# Cloud Tool Results roles and permissions Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

This page lists the IAM roles and permissions for Cloud Tool Results. To search through all roles and permissions, see the role and permission index.

## Cloud Tool Results roles

There are no IAM roles for this service.

## Cloud Tool Results permissions

Permission

Included in roles

#### cloudtoolresults.executions.create

Owner (`roles/owner`)

Editor (`roles/editor`)

Firebase Admin (`roles/firebase.admin`)

Firebase Editor (`roles/firebase.editor`)

Firebase Test Lab Admin (`roles/cloudtestservice.testAdmin`)

#### cloudtoolresults.executions.get

Owner (`roles/owner`)

Editor (`roles/editor`)

Viewer (`roles/viewer`)

Firebase Admin (`roles/firebase.admin`)

Firebase Editor (`roles/firebase.editor`)

Firebase Viewer (`roles/firebase.viewer`)

Firebase Test Lab Admin (`roles/cloudtestservice.testAdmin`)

Firebase Test Lab Viewer (`roles/cloudtestservice.testViewer`)

Support User (`roles/iam.supportUser`)

Owner (`roles/owner`)

Firebase Viewer (`roles/firebase.viewer`)

Security Admin (`roles/iam.securityAdmin`)

Security Reviewer (`roles/iam.securityReviewer`)

Firebase Test Lab Admin (`roles/cloudtestservice.testAdmin`)

Firebase Test Lab Viewer (`roles/cloudtestservice.testViewer`)

Security Auditor (`roles/iam.securityAuditor`)

Support User (`roles/iam.supportUser`)
